title: POCO F7 HP Gaming Paling Gila?
hook_text: HP Gaming Paling Gila Tahun Ini?

segments.visual: Close-up shot of phone screen lighting up with gaming graphics.
segments.narration: HP gaming paling gila tahun ini?

segments.visual: Hand holding POCO F7 with Snapdragon logo overlay.
segments.narration: Ada nih POCO F7, beast mode-nya Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 yang literally next level.

segments.visual: Graphic showing price tag popping up with animation.
segments.narration: Harganya cuma enam jutaan, which is worth it banget buat spek segede ini.

segments.visual: Split screen showing battery icon, screen brightness, and water droplet.
segments.narration: Baterai raksasa 6500mAh plus charge 90W, literally nggak perlu bawa powerbank. Layar AMOLED 1.5K kecerahan 3200 nit, which is super bright. Ada IP68, tahan air dan debu. --- Oh iya, biar nggak gampang panas, jangan main game sambil di-charge ya bestie.

segments.visual: Fast-paced montage of gaming and content creation scenes.
segments.narration: Cocok banget buat kamu yang sering gaming berat atau content creator yang butuh performa stabil.

segments.visual: Screenshot of 4.96 star rating and 20k sold counter.
segments.narration: Ratingnya 4.96 bintang, udah laku 20 ribu produk. Yang udah beli bilang, 'Dari dulu produknya nggak pernah ngecewain'.

segments.visual: Hand pointing to screen text 'finding dot id'.
segments.narration: Penasaran detail lengkapnya? Cek di finding dot id ya, ada info produknya di sana!

cta: Penasaran detail lengkapnya? Cek di finding dot id ya, ada info produknya di sana!
product_title: POCO F7 (12/512GB) | Snapdragon® 8s Gen 4 | 6500mAh with 90W HyperCharge | 6.83" 1.5K 120Hz AMOLED display | 50MP dual camera with OIS | IP68 dust and water resistance [Official Store]
